en: Please provide a letter addressing each of the following items. A sample letter can be found here. Detailed Root Cause Provide a detailed root cause stating what caused the occurrence or the subsequent performance gap. Provide corrective actions being taken to address the current performance gap and list both immediate and long term corrective actions. Circumstances and Conditions: Describe any relevant circumstances that contributed to the performance gap. Corrective Actions for Performance Gap Immediate Corrective Actions: What are the initial steps taken to correct the accident or incident? Long-Term Corrective Actions: Provide a plan to mitigate future occurrences of similar performance gaps, including: Additional Training: Outline any training programs being developed to enhance staff skills related to compressor operation and maintenance. Risk Assessment: Describe the risk assessment procedures being implemented to identify potential issues proactively. Communication Plans: Detail how communication will be enhanced both internally and externally to ensure alignment and understanding of performance expectations.

Copies of Citations or violations related to compliance: OSHA, MSHA or any governmental agency
Corrective action plans that outline specific measures taken 

OSHA 300A log for the last 3 years
<u>Supporting Documentation</u> \nPlease upload any relevant supporting documentation to substantiate your findings and corrective actions, such as:
